changeSet.author: ahri-rbac
changeSet.comment: Ensure AHRI SRS action roles seeded in 043 remain active. User and lab-unit role assignments continue to be managed through the admin UI, not migrations.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.system_role SET active = TRUE, editable = TRUE WHERE name IN ( 'Administrative Staff', 'IT Support Staff', 'EQA Personnel', 'External Stakeholders', 'Sample Collector', 'Laboratory Technician', 'Junior Researcher', 'Senior Researcher', 'Lab Manager', 'Biomedical Staff', 'Principal Investigator', 'Project Coordinator', 'Data Manager' );
